scenarios.title: completes a credit-card checkout after updating cart quantity @positive @e2e
scenarios.userAction: User updates the quantity of the second cart item, navigates to checkout, fills in valid credit card details, and submits the order.
expectedAssertions: URL navigates to /order-confirmed after payment submission
'Order confirmed' heading is visible on the confirmation page
Order summary total element containing '$' is visible

scenarios.title: disables the Checkout button when cart is empty @negative
scenarios.userAction: User removes all items from the cart, leaving it empty.
expectedAssertions: Empty cart banner is visible after all items removed
Checkout button is disabled (not actionable) when cart is empty

locatorTable.notes: CSS class only; no testid or ARIA role evidence. Q1: ask FE team to add data-testid='cart-row'. Fallback: locator('.cart-row').
Index selector on CSS class. Product name for row 2 unknown. Q1: reviewer must supply the second row's product name. Positional fallback: locator('.cart-row').nth(1) with WHY-comment.
Class name 'qty-input' implies a quantity field; visible <label> unconfirmed. Q2. Fall back to locator('input[name="qty-input"]') if no label.
Text is visible; element role assumed <button>. Q3: could be <a> link. Fall back to getByRole('link', { name: /update cart/i }) if not button.
Text visible; role could be <button> or <a>. Q4. Fall back to getByRole('link', { name: /checkout/i }) if not button.

name='card' implies card-number field; label text unconfirmed. Q6: CRITICAL — if inside Stripe/third-party iframe, must be page.frameLocator('iframe[...]').getByLabel(...). Fallback: locator('input[name="card"]').
name='exp' implies expiry field; label unconfirmed. Same iframe risk as card number — Q6. Fallback: locator('input[name="exp"]').
name='cvc' implies CVC field; label unconfirmed. Same iframe risk as card number — Q6. Fallback: locator('input[name="cvc"]').
CSS class 'pay-now' suggests accessible name 'Pay now'; unconfirmed. Q7. Fallback: locator('button.pay-now') with WHY-comment.
Confirmation-page headline assumed to be <h1>/<h2>. Q8: could be non-heading element. Fall back to getByText(/order confirmed/i).
CSS class only; no testid or role evidence. Q9: ask FE team to add data-testid='summary-total'. Interim fallback: locator('.summary-total') with WHY-comment.
Class 'remove-btn' implies 'Remove' label; accessible name unconfirmed. Q5. Fallback: locator('.remove-btn') scoped within the row.
CSS class only; ARIA role unknown. Q10: could be role='alert' or no role at all. Fallback: locator('.empty-cart-banner') with WHY-comment 'Q10 unresolved'.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: no data-testid on cart-row — CSS class fallback used.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid='cart-row' to the cart row component, then update to getByTestId.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: second row product name unknown — positional fallback locator('.cart-row').nth(1) used.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Provide the product name visible in the second cart row so the filter can be text-based instead of index-based.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: quantity input label not confirmed — getByLabel assumed from class name hint.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm the <label> text or aria-label value for the quantity field, or request an aria-label='Quantity' addition from FE.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved: element role assumed button — could be <a> link.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect DOM to confirm <button> vs <a>; switch to getByRole('link', ...) if needed.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: element role assumed button — could be <a> link to checkout page.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect DOM to confirm <button> vs <a>; switch to getByRole('link', ...) if needed.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: label text unconfirmed and iframe presence unknown — getByLabel assumed on top-level page.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: CRITICAL: confirm whether payment inputs are inside a Stripe/third-party iframe. If yes, all three card locators must be prefixed page.frameLocator('iframe[...]'). Provide iframe selector and label text.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: expiry label text unconfirmed; same iframe risk as card number.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Resolve Q6 (iframe) first; then confirm visible label text for the expiry field.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: CVC label text unconfirmed; same iframe risk as card number.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Resolve Q6 (iframe) first; then confirm visible label text for the CVC field.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q7 unresolved: button accessible name inferred from CSS class 'pay-now' — not confirmed.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect button's textContent or aria-label; update the name regex to match exactly.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q9 unresolved: no testid or ARIA role found — CSS class fallback used.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid='summary-total'; update to page.getByTestId('summary-total') once available.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q8 unresolved: element assumed to be <h1>/<h2> heading — actual tag not confirmed.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect order confirmation page DOM. If not a heading element, switch to getByText(/order confirmed/i).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: remove button accessible name inferred from class 'remove-btn' — not confirmed.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect each remove button's textContent or aria-label; adjust the name regex to match.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q10 unresolved: ARIA role on empty cart banner unknown — role='status' assumed.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect DOM for role attribute. If role='alert', use getByRole('alert'). If no role, fall back to locator('.empty-cart-banner') and request role='status' from FE.
